response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack/backend engineer with broad experience, but the role demands a current, deep C++ specialist with industrial automation, IEC 62443, MQTT, and message-broker expertise. C++ exposure is limited to a brief 7-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015, and there is no evidence of industrial cybersecurity, SDL, IoT protocols, or multi-threaded C++ systems work. Recent experience is concentrated in TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, which does not align with the core technical requirements.
strengths: 8+ years of senior-level software engineering with strong craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Experience with low-latency, high-throughput microservices and asynchronous I/O (DLang at Sociomantic)
Some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on LabWindows/CVI engineering tooling
concerns: C++ experience is stale (2015) and short (~7 months); no recent STL, multi-threaded, or modern C++ work
No demonstrated background in industrial automation, IEC 62443, SDL, MQTT, or message brokers
No exposure to industrial protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850/104, DNP 3.0) or Azure cloud

key_factors.factor: Senior engineering maturity and architecture exposure
